current_life_events: Had a tense conversation with a friend about her recent appearance-focused posts, felt belittled and self-conscious; struggling to meet a work project deadline while considering a career change; spent the weekend alone, feeling isolated.
mental_state: Feeling uncertain about her career path and friendships; questioning her self-worth due to appearance concerns.
